---
order: 4
output-file: instructions
title: Instructions
subtitle: When information presented to subjects is a "message"
---

Instructions are messages that guide participants through the study. They determine to a large extent participants' behavior.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon="false"}
**See also**

- [Instructions explanation](/explanations/9-instructions.qmd): rationale and design choices for how BDM represents instructions.
- [Questionnaires](5-questionnaires.qmd): a related structure for presenting items to participants.
:::
